mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, capability_id, capability_version, risk_level, approval_flow_model_key, approval_candidate_group, expire_seconds, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time FROM ai_capability_policy WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND capability_id = #{capabilityId} AND capability_version = #{version} AND risk_level = 'HIGH' AND status = 'ENABLED' AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
